OmniIntegrationProcedure.description: Get Opportunity and Related Contact RoleInfo by passinselected opportunity Id.
OmniIntegrationProcedure.name: GetOpportunityAndRelatedContactRoleInfo

omniProcessElements.name: Extract
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "dataRaptor Input Parameters" : [ { "inputParam" : "SelectedOppId", "element" : "SelectedOppId" } ], "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "failOnStepError" : false, "internalNotes" : "", "isActive" : true, "chainOnStep" : false, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "ignoreCache" : false, "responseJSONPath" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "actionMessage" : "", "sendJSONPath" : "", "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "id" : "", "restOptions" : { }, "bundle" : "GetOpportunityAndRelatedContactRoleInfo", "sendJSONNode" : "" }

omniProcessElements.name: PrimaryContact
omniProcessElements.propertySetConfig: { "sendOnlyAdditionalInput" : false, "failOnStepError" : false, "preventIntraListMerge" : false, "isActive" : true, "returnOnlyFailureResponse" : false, "mergeListsOrder" : [ "Extract:Opportunity:OppContactRoles" ], "responseJSONPath" : "", "filterListFormula" : "IsPrimary = true", "primaryListKey" : "", "updateFieldValue" : { }, "actionMessage" : "", "additionalOutput" : { }, "failureConditionalFormula" : "", "failureResponse" : { }, "id" : "", "additionalInput" : { }, "advancedMerge" : false, "sendJSONNode" : "", "sortInDescendingOrder" : false, "returnOnlyAdditionalOutput" : false, "hasPrimary" : false, "internalNotes" : "", "postActionLogging" : "", "preActionLogging" : "", "chainOnStep" : false, "dynamicOutputFields" : "", "responseJSONNode" : "", "executionConditionalFormula" : "", "allowMergeNulls" : false, "sendJSONPath" : "", "restOptions" : { }, "mergeFields" : [ ] }
